root: ^It looks like you could use some help.
^Contractual obligations.~^Plus I get a boxed lunch~for every cameo.
^How can I deal with all these fish?
^I'll sell you upgrades in exchange~for all those sea pellets~that Electra's been eating.
^What if I don't have enough~to buy anything?
^Then you'll have to start over~with a greedier attitude.
^And if you defeat fish,~they'll drop more~sea pellets for you.
